name: GR4J Model Parameter Calibration Workflow
description: A linear workflow to obtain calibrated GR4J model parameters through data preparation, model calibration, evaluation, and parameter extraction.

tasks.name: Prepare Hydrological Input Data
tasks.description: Prepare and preprocess precipitation, potential evapotranspiration, and observed streamflow data for GR4J model calibration.
tasks.expected_output: Cleaned and aligned time series data ready for model calibration

tasks.name: Calibrate GR4J Model
tasks.description: Perform automatic calibration of GR4J model parameters using prepared hydrological data.
tasks.expected_output: Calibrated GR4J model with optimized parameters and simulated streamflow

tasks.name: Evaluate Model Performance
tasks.description: Assess the calibrated model's performance using statistical metrics (e.g., NSE, KGE) to ensure reliability.
tasks.expected_output: Model evaluation report with performance metrics and acceptability judgment

tasks.name: Extract GR4J Parameters
tasks.description: Retrieve the final calibrated GR4J parameters (X1, X2, X3, X4) from the evaluated model.
tasks.expected_output: Final calibrated GR4J parameters as a dictionary: {"X1": value, "X2": value, "X3": value, "X4": value}

metadata.clarified_intent: 用户希望获取GR4J水文模型的率定参数（如X1、X2、X3、X4）用于模型校准或应用。
